title: LRU Cache O(1)
statement: Implement LRU Cache with O(1) get and put using OrderedDict.
hint: OrderedDict maintains insertion order
optimized: Same - OrderedDict is O(1)

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
statement: Merge k sorted linked lists into one sorted list.
hint: Push (val, list_idx) to heap
optimized: Same heap approach O(n log k)

title: Word Search
statement: Find if ABCCED exists in board [[A,B,C,E],[S,F,C,S],[A,D,E,E]].
hint: DFS from each cell, mark visited
solution:
def exist(board,word):
    rows,cols=len(board),len(board[0])
    def dfs(r,c,i):
        if i==len(word):return True
        if r<0 or r>=rows or c<0 or c>=cols or board[r][c]!=word[i]:return False
        tmp=board[r][c];board[r][c]="#"
        found=dfs(r+1,c,i+1) or dfs(r-1,c,i+1) or dfs(r,c+1,i+1) or dfs(r,c-1,i+1)
        board[r][c]=tmp;return found
    return any(dfs(r,c,0) for r in range(rows) for c in range(cols))
board=[["A","B","C","E"],["S","F","C","S"],["A","D","E","E"]]
print(exist(board,"ABCCED"))
optimized: Same backtracking O(m*n*4^L)

title: Serialize Binary Tree
statement: Serialize and deserialize a binary tree.
hint: BFS level order with null markers
optimized: Same BFS approach

title: Alien Dictionary
statement: Find character order from alien language words [wrt,wrf,er,ett,rftt].
hint: Build graph from adjacent word comparisons
optimized: Same topological sort O(C) where C=total chars

title: Regular Expression Matching
statement: Implement regex matching with . and * for aa and a*.
hint: dp[i][j] = match s[:i] with p[:j]
optimized: Same DP O(m*n)

title: Sliding Window Maximum
statement: Find max in each window of size 3 in [1,3,-1,-3,5,3,6,7].
hint: Maintain decreasing deque of indices
optimized: Same deque approach O(n)

title: Minimum Window Substring
statement: Find minimum window in ADOBECODEBANC containing ABC.
hint: Expand right, shrink left when valid
solution:
from collections import Counter
def min_window(s,t):
    need=Counter(t);missing=len(t)
    best=None;l=0
    for r,c in enumerate(s):
        if need[c]>0:missing-=1
        need[c]-=1
        if missing==0:
            while need[s[l]]<0:need[s[l]]+=1;l+=1
            if not best or r-l+1<len(best):best=s[l:r+1]
            need[s[l]]+=1;missing+=1;l+=1
    return best or ""
print(min_window("ADOBECODEBANC","ABC"))
optimized: Same sliding window O(n)

title: Course Schedule
statement: Check if you can finish all courses given prerequisites [[1,0],[0,1]].
hint: DFS with 3 states: unvisited, visiting, visited
optimized: Same DFS O(V+E)

title: Implement Trie
statement: Implement Trie with insert, search, startsWith.
input_example: insert apple, search apple, startsWith app
hint: Each node has children dict and is_end flag
optimized: Same - O(m) per operation where m=word length
